title: Human Torch
content:
{{Disambiguation | main = Jonathan Storm (Earth-616) | main_name = Jonathan Storm | main_title = Human Torch | main_image = Fantastic Four Vol 6 1 Human Torch Variant Textless.jpg | logo = [[File:Human Torch Vol 3 Logo.png|300px|center]] | noimage = No Image Male.jpg | description = The '''Human Torch''' is a charismatic and vibrant super-hero who flames on by setting his flying body on scorching hot fire. The original Human Torch is '''[[Jim Hammond]]''', the first artificial man, being created by [[Phineas Horton]] and acting as one of the most esteemed vigilantes during [[World War II]], honorably executing [[Adolf Hitler]]. The modern Human Torch is '''[[Johnny Storm]]''', a member of the [[Fantastic Four]], a family super hero explorers. Exposed to [[Glossary:Cosmic Radiation|cosmic rays]] during a space flight, Storm has since gained the power to burn endlessly with fire. {{Navigation Gallery | size = 200 | list = [[Jim Hammond|'''Jim Hammond'''
